entities.name: manifest.json
entities.context: JSON file that tracks block status and completion in the workflow system

entities.name: blocks
entities.context: Units of work tracked in the manifest with status (pending/completed)

entities.context: Process that handles communications when B14 or B25 files exist

entities.context: Block artifact that triggers communications processing

entities.name: B25_DELIVERABLE_CONTENT_MAP
entities.context: Block artifact that triggers communications processing

entities.context: In-progress workflow state marker on folders

entities.name: jq
entities.context: Command-line JSON processor used for manifest updates

relationships.context: Manifest tracks block status and completion timestamps
Existence of B14 triggers communications processing
Existence of B25 triggers communications processing
Folder transitions from [M] to [P] when all blocks complete
jq processes and updates the manifest JSON
